content.Text: [Thu 2026-04-09 01:52 UTC] You are Geld continuing Desire Cache work from the shared workspace. Read the existing desire-cache-app state and current context from the workspace, then pivot Tree Mode experimentation toward a React Flow based graph-native prototype while preserving the current Svelte staging implementation as fallback. Keep the canonical /api/items seam. Build an experimental front-end path optimized for a game-like browsing feel: compact image/icon-first nodes, hover preview on desktop, tap expand on mobile, traceable relations/edges, pan/zoom, and a freer circuit-web / skill-tree exploration model. Do not break the existing staged fallback path. Report back with what was prototyped, how React Flow was used, and whether it materially improves direction over the box-prone implementation.
